flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Talladega College fell 39% between 2021 and 2024 (1.1k → 701).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Talladega College rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($13.9k → $15.7k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Talladega College rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($13.9k → $15.7k).
